channel.title: Blender on r3w0p
channel.description: Recent content in Blender on r3w0p

item.title: YBC 7289
item.description: Recently, I wanted to learn how to use a 3D Printer after having not had the opportunity to do so for quite some time. There were many reasons why: the cost of buying one, the lack of space to store one, not knowing which one to get, and not knowing what I’d even do with one. However, I was able to gain access to a very good one without having to worry about most of the aforementioned reasons, except the last point: what should I print?
